title: ChatUtils
description: The few utilities for your chat you've always needed.
body:
# ChatUtils

A very configurable and simple chat utility mod with essential features you've always wanted.

### Copy messages to clipboard easily

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CV78DFSF/images/dbc9014fdafb1d8726ab38d2cc5655d7a71966b6.png)


![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CV78DFSF/images/d893b61604636fceec35feccbfa6f3212b160ed0.png)

### Keep your chat clean with anti spam

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CV78DFSF/images/f0d0b3ac26796959e43702657d2099b8d3740856.png)

### Don't lose your precious messages when you rejoin your favourite servers

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CV78DFSF/images/99a3e6605ab941029b4aaff9366415d997a51b4b.png)

### No more losing complex commands after logging out

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CV78DFSF/images/f27da5b16208cce4a4e1797fb31a7c83b9c240d5.png)

### It's so configurable, you can do (almost) anything you want

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CV78DFSF/images/0cc6bf54679f22a6d69f237a598efed10959a4cd.png)

## Dependencies
- Cloth Config
- Fabric Mod Menu
- Fabric API

## Older Versions
All versions below `1.19.1` are unsupported. Use these at your own risk. They can only be retrived through the mod's [repository](https://github.com/tierrif/chat-utils) in GitHub.

## How to use it
ChatUtils is a very simple mod, so it's also very simple to use. By default, hovering received messages in chat should show a tooltip with a preview of what is going to be copied. To copy it to clipboard, simply click the message.

All features can be enabled/disabled in the mod settings. You can find these in the mod menu.

## Issues
Please report any issues you find in the GitHub's issues section. Please feel free to suggest new features!
